parameters.apprise_url_plus: atalk://${ customer_secrets.{{ params.appuser_secret }} }@${ customer_secrets.{{ params.apikey_secret }} }/${ customer_secrets.{{ params.targets_secret }} }
parameters.description: Send notifications to your own Africa's Talking destination through the UnitySVC gateway. POST the unified message envelope {title, body, type, format}; the gateway composes an Apprise atalk:// URL from your stored secrets and delivers via apprise.unitysvc.dev. The free apprise channel uses your own stored credentials; the apprise-plus channel binds extra per-enrollment destinations via parameters. The gateway/gateway-plus channels transform the envelope directly into an Africa's Talking Messaging API form body and post it to api.africastalking.com (no Apprise).
parameters.gateway_body_template: username=${ customer_secrets.AFRICASTALKING_SMS_USERNAME }&to=${ customer_secrets.AFRICASTALKING_SMS_TO }&from=${ customer_secrets.AFRICASTALKING_SMS_FROM }&message={* ((_body.title or "") .. ((_body.title and _body.title ~= "" and _body.body and _body.body ~= "") and ": " or "") .. (_body.body or "")) *}
parameters.gateway_plus_price_description: $0.001 per message — extra per-enrollment Africa's Talking destinations, direct
parameters.gateway_price_description: Free — direct to Africa's Talking Messaging API (no Apprise)

apikey_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's Africa's Talking apikey

appuser_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's Africa's Talking appuser

targets_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's Africa's Talking targets
